item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-031","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in the release-review lane: it identified missing release inputs, asked for diff/SHAs/file list/package/changelog, and stated it would review high-risk issues, regressions, compatibility/migration risks, test gaps, and release recommendation. It did not route into a TVG/artifact-strengthening loop merely because of the word “audit.”"}
